scripts.deploy-cf-worker: echo 'Deploy to Cloudflare with: wrangler deploy --config wrangler.worker.jsonc' && npm_config_ignore_scripts=true npx --yes wrangler@4.72.0 deploy --config wrangler.worker.jsonc
scripts.deploy-cf-page: echo 'Deploy to Cloudflare Pages project: siteproxy' && npm_config_ignore_scripts=true npx --yes wrangler@4.72.0 pages deploy build/cf_page --project-name siteproxy --branch main
